💼 Net Salary Calculator

Calculate your take-home pay from your gross annual salary instantly.

Enter your gross annual salary

⚠️ This calculator uses Spanish tax rates (IRPF + Social Security). Results are estimates.

What is net salary?

Net salary (take-home pay) is the amount you actually receive in your bank account after all deductions — income tax (IRPF in Spain) and social security contributions. The difference between gross and net can be significant, typically between 20% and 35% of gross salary.

Frequently asked questions

What deductions are taken from gross salary?

In Spain, two main deductions apply — Social Security contributions (approximately 6.35% paid by the employee) and income tax withholding (IRPF), which ranges from 19% to 47% depending on your income bracket.

How much net salary with €30,000 gross?

With €30,000 gross annually, the approximate monthly net salary is €1,850–€1,950, depending on your personal situation.

Is this calculator accurate?

It is an approximation based on Spanish 2024 tax rates. For an exact calculation use the official Spanish Tax Agency simulator.
